ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Executor to appear on September 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. If said petition is not filed by that date, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will begin to run. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Continued To Aug-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for Carol Ann Williamson.

Mr. Wall explained circumstances as to why he has not filed for final distribution and requested a continuance. The status of closing the estate was continued to August 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m.., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
